tree.setup: Your manager's office, late afternoon. Director Ma keeps a single framed calligraphy scroll on his wall: 知足常乐 — 'contentment brings happiness.' You find this deeply ironic given that you're here to ask for a raise. His desk is immaculate except for a small jade paperweight shaped like a turtle, which he turns slowly when thinking.
tree.setup_zh: 下午晚些时候，你经理的办公室。马主任墙上挂着一幅书法：「知足常乐。」鉴于你来这里是要谈加薪的，这幅字的讽刺意味相当深刻。他的桌面一尘不染，只有一个乌龟形状的小玉石镇纸，他思考时会慢慢转动它。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 请进，请坐。你说想和我谈谈，什么事？
turns.text_pinyin: qǐng jìn, qǐng zuò. nǐ shuō xiǎng hé wǒ tántan, shénme shì?
turns.text_en: Come in, please sit. You said you wanted to talk — what about?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Bring up the topic of your salary.

options.text_zh: 马主任，谢谢您抽时间。我想跟您谈一下薪资的事。我在公司已经工作两年了，想讨论一下调薪的可能性。
options.text_pinyin: Mǎ zhǔrèn, xièxie nín chōu shíjiān. wǒ xiǎng gēn nín tán yíxià xīnzī de shì. wǒ zài gōngsī yǐjīng gōngzuò liǎng nián le, xiǎng tǎolùn yíxià tiáo xīn de kěnéngxìng.
options.text_en: Director Ma, thank you for your time. I'd like to discuss my salary. I've been with the company for two years and would like to talk about the possibility of an adjustment.
options.feedback: Respectful framing with concrete tenure. Director Ma's turtle paperweight begins its first slow rotation.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ xiǎng tántan gōngzī de wèntí.
options.text_en: I'd like to talk about my salary.
options.feedback: Direct. He appreciates not having to guess, though 薪资 sounds a touch more professional than 工资 in this context.

options.text_zh: 我觉得我的工资有点低。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ juéde wǒ de gōngzī yǒudiǎn dī.
options.text_en: I feel my salary is a bit low.
options.feedback: Jumping straight to the complaint — Director Ma's hand moves to the turtle. This will require more persuasion.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 嗯，两年了。你觉得自己这两年有什么突出的成绩？
turns.text_pinyin: ǹg, liǎng nián le. nǐ juéde zìjǐ zhè liǎng nián yǒu shénme tūchū de chéngjì?
turns.text_en: Hmm, two years. What do you think your standout achievements have been in these two years?

options.text_zh: 去年我带的那个项目提前完成了，帮公司节省了大概百分之十的成本。今年又拿到了两个新客户。
options.text_pinyin: qùnián wǒ dài de nàge xiàngmù tíqián wánchéng le, bāng gōngsī jiéshěng le dàgài bǎi fēn zhī shí de chéngběn. jīnnián yòu ná dào le liǎng gè xīn kèhù.
options.text_en: Last year the project I led was completed ahead of schedule, saving the company about 10% in costs. This year I've brought in two new clients.
options.feedback: Numbers and specifics — the language Director Ma respects most. The turtle completes a full rotation.

options.text_zh: 我一直很努力工作，同事们都觉得我做得不错。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ yìzhí hěn nǔlì gōngzuò, tóngshìmen dōu juéde wǒ zuò de búcuò.
options.text_en: I've always worked hard, and my colleagues think I do a good job.
options.feedback: Subjective but not untrue. He'll want something more concrete to take to HR.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ měi tiān dōu jiā bān dào hěn wǎn.
options.text_en: I work overtime until late every day.
options.feedback: Hours worked is effort, not results. Director Ma glances at the calligraphy scroll, then back at you.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 这些我都知道。你希望调整多少？
turns.text_pinyin: zhèxiē wǒ dōu zhīdào. nǐ xīwàng tiáozhěng duōshǎo?
turns.text_en: I'm aware of all this. How much of an adjustment are you hoping for?

options.text_zh: 我希望能加百分之十五左右。这个数字是根据我的业绩和市场水平来定的。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ xīwàng néng jiā bǎi fēn zhī shíwǔ zuǒyòu. zhège shùzì shì gēnjù wǒ de yèjì hé shìchǎng shuǐpíng lái dìng de.
options.text_en: I'm hoping for about 15%. That figure is based on my performance and market rates.
options.feedback: Anchored to data, not emotion. Director Ma nods — this is a negotiation, not a complaint session.

options.text_zh: 多一点就好。具体多少您决定。
options.text_pinyin: duō yìdiǎn jiù hǎo. jùtǐ duōshǎo nín juédìng.
options.text_en: A bit more would be nice. You can decide the exact amount.
options.feedback: Deferential, which is culturally safe but strategically weak. You've given him the wheel.
Director Ma's eyebrow rises exactly two millimeters. Humor is welcome in many places, but salary meetings have a limited quota.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 百分之十五……我需要跟人事部商量一下。不过你的贡献我是认可的。下个星期给你答复。
turns.text_pinyin: bǎi fēn zhī shíwǔ……wǒ xūyào gēn rénshì bù shāngliáng yíxià. búguò nǐ de gòngxiàn wǒ shì rènkě de. xià gè xīngqī gěi nǐ dáfù.
turns.text_en: 15%... I need to discuss with HR. But I do recognize your contributions. I'll give you an answer next week.

options.text_zh: 谢谢马主任。不管结果怎样，我都很感谢您愿意考虑。
options.text_pinyin: xièxie Mǎ zhǔrèn. bùguǎn jiéguǒ zěnyàng, wǒ dōu hěn gǎnxiè nín yuànyì kǎolǜ.
options.text_en: Thank you, Director Ma. Regardless of the outcome, I appreciate your willingness to consider it.
options.feedback: Gracious regardless of outcome — Director Ma looks up at 知足常乐 and, for once, seems to agree with it.

options.text_zh: 好的，谢谢。我等您的消息。
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, xièxie. wǒ děng nín de xiāoxi.
options.text_en: OK, thanks. I'll wait for your reply.
options.feedback: Professional patience. The turtle paperweight is still.
The 吧 at the end carries a note of resignation. Director Ma notices, but says nothing.

tree.cultural_note: Salary discussions in Chinese workplaces tend to be more indirect than in Western cultures. Framing a raise request around 贡献 (gòngxiàn, contributions) and 市场水平 (shìchǎng shuǐpíng, market rates) is more effective than expressing dissatisfaction. Many companies review salaries annually during 年终考核 (nián zhōng kǎohé, year-end evaluations).
